headline: Automate your on-call runbook
snippet: Yes, we take security very seriously. - We are fully SOC2 Type II and HIPAA compliant - All your data is encrypted and kept logically isolated - Neither we nor any of our data providers ever use your
full_text: Yes, we take security very seriously. - We are fully SOC2 Type II and HIPAA compliant - All your data is encrypted and kept logically isolated - Neither we nor any of our data providers ever use your data for training Find out more at trust.struct.ai
